title: chlorophytum niveum
intro: Chlorophytum niveum, also known as the White Spider Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. It is traditionally used in African herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chlorophytum niveum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are typically used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
